name: Jerky a La Willie Rev. 4.1
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Bottle of low sodium soy sauce
Up to 3 lb lean meat (e.g., beef, deer, elk)
recipeInstructions:
Use in place of smoker.  Beef, deer, elk, etc.
1. Mix all ingredients except meat to make marinade.
2. Cut thinly sliced meat into 1/2 inch strips and marinate for 12 to 24 hours (the longer the better).
3. Smoke using mesquite chips for about three hours.
4. Finish drying in oven by placing strips on the highest rack and putting a shallow pan underneath to catch drippings.
5. Turn off oven and leave for 6 to 8 hours until thoroughly dried.
Warnings:
- Do not overcrowd the meat while smoking or drying in the oven.
- Ensure the oven is turned off completely before leaving it unattended.
